records.blind_evidence_notes: Blind evidence repl_v3_commerce_001_u01:user:content.operation_scope_ref. operation_scope_ref is a user constraint that selects the requested operation scope and changes terminal validity. The distinct authorization_state claim carries the authority/safety gate.
